title: Chewy Low Fat Canadian Lime Stir-fry
description: A fresh and chewy low-fat dish featuring unwaxed limes, ideal for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Combine lime juice and zest in a blender. Add ginger, garlic, soy sauce, vinegar, sesame oil, and milk into the blender with the lime mixture.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add brown rice noodles to the wok and stir-fry for 2 minutes until heated through.
Add mixed vegetables to the pan, stir-frying them for an additional 3-4 minutes, or until they start to wilt slightly.
Pour in the lime mixture and continue to cook stirring constantly for about 5 minutes. The sauce will reduce slightly as it cooks.
Taste test and adjust seasonings if needed. Serve hot over the rice noodles.
